analysis.reasoning: Core message: The author is engaging with EU leaders on COVID-19, acknowledges citizens’ fatigue, calls for patience, discipline, and solidarity to slow the virus, and asserts that the EU is working hard on all aspects of the crisis. Evaluation: EU1 (EU as a successful story) – Not promoted; no historical perspective or success narrative. EU2 (EU is united) – Promoted implicitly: reference to discussing with EU leaders and a call for solidarity during a crisis suggests coordination and unity. EU3 (EU is useful for its citizens) – Promoted: states the EU is working hard on all aspects of the crisis, addressing citizens’ concerns about COVID-19, implying practical action. EU4 (avant-garde actor) – Not indicated; no pioneering policy/regulatory leadership claim. EU5 (global champion of fair causes) – Not relevant to rights/democracy themes. EU6 (EU contributes to a better world) – Not applicable; focus is internal EU crisis management, not global outreach. Conclusion: EU2 and EU3 are promoted.
